dm_location: No single DM chapter; distributed across Ch.4 Housing, Ch.12 Transport, Ch.3 Placemaking, Ch.5 Rural
rural_min_site_area: No fixed numeric minimum site area in Volume 1 (NPF NPO19 need/siting/design tests)
wastewater_standard: Site suitability + wastewater per Chapter 5 §5.6; no development within 100 m of WWTW or 25 m of pumping station
residential_density_dph: High 50+ (no upper); Medium A 30-50; Medium B 20-35; Medium C 5-20; village infill up to 30
plot_ratio: Applied as density tool in specific mixed-use areas; no single county-wide numeric value in Volume 1
public_open_space_pct: 10% minimum (high density); 20% public open space former institutional lands (Medium A)
building_height: Urban generally 2-4 storeys; >4 storeys per para 3.2 Building Heights Guidelines 2018; redevelopment >2 ha needs master plan
trigger_AA: Screening for plans/projects affecting European sites (SAC/SPA); NIS where significant negative effects cannot be screened out (s.177 PDA 2010)
trigger_EIA: EIAR where EIA determined necessary per Regulations thresholds/screening; sub-threshold where significant effects likely
trigger_FRA: FRA/drainage impact for all applications (§11.11); site-specific FRA in Flood Zone A/B; DM Justification Test in flood zones; minor works exempt
trigger_AHIA: Archaeological assessment for development area ≥0.5 ha or length ≥1 km; protected structures/ACA in Chapter 16
trigger_TTA: TTA + Road Safety Audit where material impact on traffic; Mobility Management Plans for 50+ employees / 100+ residential units / education-community-health
notes: Sightline x/y referenced to national road design standards, not tabulated in Volume 1. Motorcycle 1 bay per 10 car spaces. EV: 1 recharge point for non-residential >10 spaces by 1 Jan 2025.
